justification: Demo billback under PROMO-2026-Q1-012 lacking signed Exhibit B forms but corroborated by sampling-station photos from 22 stores and holiday-week scan lift. Applying the same 60% demo-billback convention (precedent SH-2025-Q4-007): 35 events x $300 = $10,500 claimed; settle partial at 60% = $6,300.00. Note the claim exceeds the $10,000 threshold but the drafted settlement is below it, so a partial is appropriate rather than an escalation.
